name: Israel Museum
description: Home to major biblical archaeology holdings including the Shrine of the Book and several key inscriptions.

name: British Museum
description: A major repository for Neo-Assyrian, Persian, and Levantine inscriptions and reliefs relevant to biblical studies.

name: Louvre Museum
description: Houses the Mesha Stele, a foundational inscription for Moabite and Israelite history.

name: Egyptian Museum
description: Preserves major Egyptian monuments including the Merneptah Stele.

name: Istanbul Archaeology Museums
description: Holds the original Siloam Inscription and several related Levantine inscriptions.

name: Private collection
description: Placeholder record for disputed or privately held items that should not be treated as settled public museum holdings.
